Title: Calvi, Girolamo-Luigi
Overview: Author of Notizie sulla vita, 1859-1869, the first great history of Milanese art of the 14th to the 16th century; largely established the canon of early Milanese artists.
Archives: • Carte di Girolamo Luigi Calvi, Università degli Studi di Milano. https://archivi.unimi.it/oggetti/IT-UNIMI-ST0013-000119_carte-di-girolamo-luigi-calvi/.
